applicable risk rate is what determines the payments made to the MA plan 

The base (resolved) risk score file has each beneficiary’s monthly Part C and Part D “resolved” risk scores (i.e., the 
PTC_RISK_SCORE_MM variable and PTD_RISK_SCORE_MM, where MM is the month 01 through 12), and the
